description: You are a backend developer at a game studio building a chess engine. The core data structures (`Board`, `Piece`) are complete, but the move validation logic is missing. Implement the move generation and validation logic in `chess/moves.py` and `chess/validation.py` within the project at `/home/ga/PycharmProjects/chess_validator`. Your implementation must include piece movement logic for the Pawn, Knight, Bishop, Rook, Queen, and King, as well as validation logic for `is_in_check`, `is_checkmate`, and `get_legal_moves`. Do not modify `chess/board.py`, `chess/pieces.py`, or any files in `tests/`. All 42 tests must pass.
